meta.note: Sample schedule derived from program research; verify dates and tickets at source sites.

recurring.title: Cuyahoga Valley Farmers Market
recurring.summary: Producer-only Saturday market, rain or shine. Seasonal venue shift between Peninsula and Akron.

events.title: Maple Sugar Festival & Pancake Breakfast
events.summary: Maple sugaring, period crafts; pancake breakfast ticket options.

events.title: Maple Sugar Festival & Pancake Breakfast
events.summary: Weekend dates for the spring maple tradition.

events.title: CVSR — National Park Scenic
events.summary: Flagship park excursion; multiple stations and departures—see official ticket calendar.

events.title: Nature Rx | Reciprocity through Volunteerism
events.summary: Earth Day–themed stewardship and guided reflection; registration via Eventbrite.

events.title: CVSR — Create-A-Critter (Family Fun Loop)
events.summary: Family-oriented excursion series; pricing varies by train.

events.title: CVSR — Western Locomotive (Themed)
events.summary: Themed evening ride; confirm schedule on CVSR calendar.

events.title: Photo Exploration Hike — Frazee House
events.summary: Guided hike with your own camera; under 2 mi, some hills.

events.title: Cuyahoga Valley Photo Society — Juxtapositions
events.summary: Evening program; ticketing via Eventbrite.

events.title: CVFM — Summer season opens (Howe Meadow)
events.summary: Outdoor market season through late October.

events.title: Elevation — Conservancy fundraiser
events.summary: Annual benefit supporting Trails Now Fund; rain or shine.

events.title: Topography — Conservancy dinner
events.summary: Annual dinner fundraiser; valet noted for past editions.

events.title: Sow & Grow Festival & Plant Sale
events.summary: Farm demonstrations, plant sale, partner exhibits.

events.title: Juneteenth Celebration
events.summary: Multi-day commemoration and interpretive programming.

events.title: Boston Mills Artfest — June show
events.summary: Fine art festival weekend; verify public hours and admission.

events.title: Boston Mills Artfest — July show
events.summary: Second summer weekend of the juried art festival.

events.title: Blossom Music Festival (season)
events.summary: Cleveland Orchestra summer home; many dated performances—see official calendar.

events.title: Made in Ohio Art & Craft Festival
events.summary: Labor Day weekend craft festival; published gate pricing on festival site.

events.title: Harvest Festival (weekend 1)
events.summary: Fall seasonal programming and demonstrations.

events.title: Harvest Festival (weekend 2)
events.summary: Second fall festival weekend.

events.title: CVFM — Winter season opens (Old Trail School)
events.summary: Indoor Saturday market season.

events.title: Holiday Art & Craft Market
events.summary: Free admission for shoppers; vendor-focused application on file for 2026.

events.title: Holiday Lantern Tours
events.summary: Lantern-lit village walks; uneven terrain—see accessibility notes on WRHS.
